task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into FreeMED.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeMED dashboard or main interface is visible in the web browser.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Call-In Patient module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Call-In Patient' module, list, or entry form is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the caller's name was entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Margaret' is entered in the first name field and 'Whitfield' is entered in the last name field of the Call-In Patient form.

task_completion.description: Verify the caller's Date of Birth was entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date '07/22/1978' is entered in the DOB (Date of Birth) field.

task_completion.description: Verify the caller's home and work phone numbers were entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The number '(617) 555-3847' is entered in the Home Phone field, and '(617) 555-9201' is entered in the Work Phone field.

task_completion.description: Verify the caller's complaint was entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Persistent lower back pain for 3 weeks, requesting evaluation' (or containing the keywords 'lower', 'back', 'pain') is entered in the complaint, reason, or notes field.

task_completion.description: Verify the Call-In Patient record was saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the record was saved, or the newly created record for Margaret Whitfield is visible in the Call-In Patient list/view mode.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the FreeMED web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is using a web browser to interact with the FreeMED GUI, rather than using terminal commands, API calls, or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not create a regular patient record.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is strictly using the 'Call-In Patient' module. There should be no evidence of the agent using the standard 'Patients' or 'Demographics' module to create a full patient chart.

integrity.description: Verify the data was entered into the actual application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: The patient details are typed into the specific input fields of the FreeMED form, not just pasted into a text editor, terminal, or search bar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Module: Call-In Patient. Patient Name: Margaret Whitfield. DOB: 07/22/1978. Home Phone: (617) 555-3847. Work Phone: (617) 555-9201. Complaint keywords: lower, back, pain. The agent must strictly use the Call-In Patient module and MUST NOT create a regular patient record.
